panels.title: Average Wait Time by Route (Current Window)

targets.rawSql: SELECT route || ' ' || dir AS route, ROUND(avg_wait_sec::numeric, 0) AS avg_wait_sec FROM eta_realtime WHERE window_start = (SELECT MAX(window_start) FROM eta_realtime) ORDER BY avg_wait_sec DESC
SELECT route, dir, ROUND(avg_wait_sec::numeric, 0) AS avg_wait_sec, sample_count FROM eta_realtime WHERE delay_flag = true AND window_start >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' ORDER BY avg_wait_sec DESC
SELECT window_start AS time, route || ' ' || dir AS metric, avg_wait_sec AS value FROM eta_realtime WHERE window_start >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes' ORDER BY window_start
